recommendations.title: Run Sweetheart Run
recommendations.overview: A woman runs for her life though the streets of Los Angeles after her blind date suddenly turns violent.

recommendations.title: The Greatest
recommendations.overview: Teenagers Rose and Bennett were in love, and then a car crash claimed Bennett's life. He left behind a grieving mother, father and younger brother, and Rose was left all alone. She has no family to turn to for support, so when she finds out she's pre

recommendations.title: Country Strong
recommendations.overview: Soon after the rising young singer-songwriter Beau Williams gets involved with a fallen, emotionally unstable country star Kelly Canter, the pair embark on a career resurrection tour helmed by her husband/manager James and featuring a beauty queen-tu

recommendations.title: Three Steps Above Heaven
recommendations.overview: Babi, a sheltered upper-class girl, and Hache, a reckless rebel obsessed with illegal motorcycle races, fall into a forbidden love that pulls them deeper into passion and risk.

recommendations.title: Summer with Monika
recommendations.overview: One summer day, two teens begin a reckless affair and abandon their families to be with one another.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Bojangles
recommendations.overview: A boy and his eccentric parents leave their home in Paris for a country house in Spain. As the mother descends deeper into her own mind, it's up to the boy and his father to keep her safe and happy.

recommendations.title: The Last Letter from Your Lover
recommendations.overview: A young journalist in London becomes obsessed with a series of letters she discovers that recounts an intense star-crossed love affair from the 1960s.

recommendations.title: And Then We Danced

recommendations.title: Down in the Valley
recommendations.overview: On a trip to the beach, a teenage girl named Tobe meets a charismatic stranger named Harlan, who dresses like a cowboy and claims to be a former ranch hand. The pair feel an instant attraction and begin a relationship, but her father, a lawman, is su

recommendations.title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
recommendations.overview: An uptight MBA student falls for the charismatic new neighbor who charms her troubled family – but he has a secret that forces him to push her away.
